lines.lyrics: Kehna hi kya ye nein ik anjaan se jo mile
lines.indian: Dha Ni Ga' Re': Sa': Ni Re' Ni Dha Dha(k) Dha(k) Dha Ni Dha Dha(k) ma Ga Ga:

lines.lyrics: Chalne lagi mohabbat ke jaise ye silsile
lines.indian: Dha Ni Ga' Re': Sa': Ni Re' Ni Dha Dha(k) Dha(k) Dha Ni Dha Dha(k) ma Ga Ga:

lines.lyrics: Armaan naye aise dil mein khile
lines.indian: ma ma ma Ni Dha Dha(k) ma Ga Re Sa Re Ga
ma ma Re ni Re ma ma: Ga Ga:

lines.lyrics: Vo humse hum unse kabhi na mile
lines.indian: ma ma ma Ni Dha Dha(k) ma Ga Re Sa Re Ga
ma ma Re ni Re ma ma: Ga Ga:

lines.lyrics: Ab kya karein kya naam lein
lines.indian: Ga ma Pa Pa Pa: ma Pa Dha Dha Dha:
Pa Dha Ni Sa' Ga' Re' Re': Ga' Re'
